children.text: Looking back at my junior high school years, there is one person whom I will never forget.
children.cn: 回首我的初中岁月，有一个人我永远不会忘记。

children.text: That person is Ms. Griffin, my kind and caring English teacher.
children.cn: 那个人就是格里芬老师，我善良而又体贴的英语老师。

children.text: When I entered Grade 7, I was the shiest student in my class, often remaining silent and fearing that I would fail.
children.cn: 当我进入七年级时，我是班里最害羞的学生，经常保持沉默并担心自己会不及格。

children.text: Fortunately, Ms. Griffin noticed my anxiety and was always patient with me.
children.cn: 幸运的是，格里芬老师注意到了我的焦虑，并且总是对我很耐心。

children.text: Whenever I encountered difficulties, she guided me to find the answers instead of just giving them to me.
children.cn: 每当我遇到困难时，她都会引导我自己找出答案，而不是直接把答案给我。

children.text: She constantly encouraged me, saying, "You can do it!"
children.cn: 她不断鼓励我，说：“你能行！”

children.text: Inspired by her belief in me, I put in much more effort, and as a result, my exam scores doubled.
children.cn: 在对我的信任鼓舞下，我付出了多得多的努力，因此，我的考试成绩翻了一番。

children.text: Now that I am about to graduate, I feel extremely thankful to her.
children.cn: 既然我即将毕业，我感到极其感激她。

children.text: Not only did she help me improve my grades, but she also taught me how to overcome fear.
children.highlight: Not only...but she also, how to
children.cn: 她不仅帮助我提高了成绩，而且还教会我了如何克服恐惧。

children.text: She has truly changed my life, and I will look forward to senior high with the confidence she gave me.
children.cn: 她真的改变了我的生活，我将带着她给我的信心向往高中生活。
